Starting with the equation (2x + 1)/x = 4. Multiply both sides by x to eliminate the denominator: 2x + 1 = 4x. Subtract 2x from both sides: 1 = 2x. So x = 1/2. 

Now plug this x back into the expression x + 6. That gives 1/2 + 6 = 6.5 or 13/2.
